articles.title: State Police searching for Berkshire County man after suspicious early-morning fire
articles.description:
No injuries were reported in the Monterey house fire, but officials say it may have been intentionally set.

The post State Police searching for Berkshire County man after suspicious early-morning fire appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: State Police investigate a suspicious fire in Monterey, Berkshire County, with no reported injuries.
Authorities suspect the fire, occurring early morning, may have been intentionally set.
Local residents urged to remain vigilant as search for the suspect continues.

articles.title: Lured by pepperoni, dog rescued from 12-foot backyard sinkhole on Cape Cod
articles.description:
Tessa, the 11-year-old yellow Labrador was pulled back above ground with the assist of pepperoni, fire officials said.

The post Lured by pepperoni, dog rescued from 12-foot backyard sinkhole on Cape Cod appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Fire officials rescued Tessa, an 11-year-old Labrador, from a 12-foot sinkhole.
Rescue involved using pepperoni to lure Tessa back to safety.
Incident highlights potential hazards of backyard sinkholes for Cape Cod residents.

articles.title: New England-based rescue takes in batch of neglected axolotls
articles.description:
Libertyland Axolotl Rescue, a nonprofit network of foster parents around New England, is looking for donations to support the rehabilitation of the "cheese babes."

The post New England-based rescue takes in batch of neglected axolotls appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Libertyland Axolotl Rescue takes in neglected axolotls for rehabilitation.
The nonprofit seeks donations to support care for these animals.
Local residents can contribute to the welfare of these unique pets.

articles.title: TSA officers in Mass. and across nation share how they’re scraping by without pay
articles.description:
“I never thought I would be in a position where, working for the federal government, I would need to go to a food bank to supplement my groceries.”

The post TSA officers in Mass. and across nation share how they’re scraping by without pay appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: TSA officers in Massachusetts report financial struggles due to unpaid work.
Many officers are relying on food banks to meet basic needs.
This situation affects local airport operations and security staffing.

articles.title: The beauty of a few cracks
articles.description:
How dents, burn marks, and other imperfections can come to represent friendship, partnership, and personal growth.

The post The beauty of a few cracks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore how imperfections symbolize growth in Boston relationships.
The article highlights personal stories from local residents about their experiences.
Encourages Boston residents to embrace flaws in friendships and partnerships.

articles.title: Waltham High opens student-run salon for real-world cosmetology training
articles.description:
The 25-station cosmetology space gives students hands-on experience in hair, skin, and nail care while working toward professional licensure.

The post Waltham High opens student-run salon for real-world cosmetology training appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Waltham High School opens a 25-station student-run salon for cosmetology training.
Students gain hands-on experience in hair, skin, and nail care for professional licensure.
Local residents can access affordable beauty services while supporting student education.

articles.title: CeCarré brings a $48 gold-and-caviar-topped pizza to the Pru
articles.description:
For about half the price, CeCarré Pizza & Provisions also serves pizzas with ingredients like pepperoni, basil, french fries, and Gochujang.

The post CeCarré brings a $48 gold-and-caviar-topped pizza to the Pru appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: CeCarré Pizza & Provisions opens at the Prudential Center, offering luxury pizza options.
The $48 gold-and-caviar pizza is the most expensive item on the menu.
More affordable pizzas with unique toppings like Gochujang are available for Boston residents.
